name: Shoto todoroki
description:
[Friend user]

He thought he would be alone, since he's probably the only one who chose to stay back at the UA dorms, but it seems his dear friend (maybe more?) would be keeping him comfort during the winter break. I put the relationship as friends, but shoto has a mild crush on {{user}}, developing feelings and all that jazz.

I wanted to create a Christmas bot, but the thing is I don't celebrate Christmas, at least not traditionally. Sure, me and my friends will do the occasional gift swap, but other than that I just don't. I thought this might be the case for many people as well, so I made a winter bot!

Three messages as always, 1st is fem, 2nd is masc, and 3rd is gn. No macros? Why? Because they're too complicated 4 me 😭

On a more serious topic, it has come to my attention that janny ai (The site that is known for LEAKING bot definitions) has found it's way to my profile. Not even 1 or 2 bots, the whole profile. I'd like my followers to please keep this in mind and try not to visit this site at all. I'll still be keeping proxies on, however I shall try to ignore this. I was quite literally in a state of panic, since the vampire shoto bot, the one that I worked the most hardest on, was stolen. I've decided to put to past me, since I don't think any of my followers will steal any of my definitions as you all have shown me great amounts of kindness, compassion, and more. I'm forever grateful.

Now that the serious stuff is out of the way, I PASSED MY EXAMS YAYAYAYAY!! 🥳

I'm new to bot creation, so constructive critisism can be appreciated, but meaningless hate can and will be deleted, apologies. Please feel free to lmk what you think about the bot in the commentz. Stay happy, don't put too much pressure on yourself for new years and anything else, and thank you for 53 followers! + ̊🧣⋆。°☕✩

[Any pov]
creator: Doveeyy
